Create Token

Create your own token with liquidity and tax fee on many networks in less than a minute with our full audited smart contract solidity code, 100% token ownership. The coin creation fee is only $1. Once you pay the fee, the entire currency is in your wallet

Please pay attention to the steps.

1- Enter your new currency data, then click on the Wallet Connect button.

2 - The wallet window will open and ask you to connect to the site

3- After connecting to the site, another window will open asking you to transfer your new currency to the liquidity pool to be listed on decentralized trading platforms.

Important note: Since the currency is in the process of being created, in the conversion window you will find the value in the main currency of the network, that is, you will find the name Ethereum and not the name of your currency because your currency has not yet been placed in the wallet records.

4 - After agreeing to transfer your currency to the liquidity pool, another window will open informing you that a new currency will be added to your wallet and you will find all your currency data.

5- After approval, you will find your complete currency in your wallet, and $1 will be deducted from you as the currency creation fee

After less than an hour, you will find your currency appearing on the platforms and trading on it will begin
